zh.Bisley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利
zh.Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾比

zh.of Bisley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Bohun於1252年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利時，她的父親Humphrey de Bohun V29歲，母親Eleanor de Braose24歲。她於大約1275年與Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun在英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年8月24日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾比享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Bohun于1252年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾比士利时，她的父亲Humphrey de Bohun V29岁，母亲Eleanor de Braose24岁。她于大约1275年与Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun在英国格盧斯特斯爾比士利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年8月24日在英国苏格兰雷福福爾艾比享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Bohun was born in 1252, in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Humphrey de Bohun V, was 29 and her mother, Eleanor de Braose, was 24. She married Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun about 1275, in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 August 1309, in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Bohun est née en 1252, à Bisley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey de Bohun V, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Braose, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun environ 1275, à Bisley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1309, à Abbey, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Bohun 1252 in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey de Bohun V 29 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Braose 24. Sie hat um 1275 in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. August 1309 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Bohun è nata il nel 1252 nel Bisley, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Humphrey de Bohun V, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Braose, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun circa 1275, nel Bisley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1309, nel Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Bohunが1252年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビスリーで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Bohun Vは29歳，母Eleanor de Braoseは24歳であった。約1275年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビスリーでTheobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年8月24日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアアビーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Bohun(이)가 1252년 영국 그루스스터실르 비슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey de Bohun V(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Braose(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1275년 영국 그루스스터실르 비슬리에서 Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 8월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 애브브이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: Abbey, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Bohun nasceu em 1252, em Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey de Bohun V, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Braose, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun aproximadamente 1275, em Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1309, em Abbey, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Bohun родилась в 1252 г. в местности бисли, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey de Bohun V было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Braose, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun около 1275 г. в местности бисли, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 августа 1309 г. в местности эбби, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Bohun nació en 1252, en Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey de Bohun V, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Braose, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun aproximadamente 1275, en Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1309, en Abbey, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
